files.reason: Wait for live commit parity after Railway upload, then run the full ship check automatically.
files.excerpt:
diff --git a/deploy.sh b/deploy.sh
index 5486822..492e4ef 100755
--- a/deploy.sh
+++ b/deploy.sh
@@ -76,2 +76,12 @@ git push origin main
 
+DEPLOY_BRANCH="$(git branch --show-current)"
+DEPLOY_COMMIT="$(git rev-parse HEAD)"
+
+echo ""
+echo "=== Stamping Railway deploy fingerprint ==="
+echo "Branch: $DEPLOY_BRANCH"
+echo "Commit: $DEPLOY_COMMIT"
+railway variable set --skip-deploys "SMIRK_DEPLOY_BRANCH=$DEPLOY_BRANCH"
+railway variable set --skip-deploys "SMIRK_DEPLOY_VERSION=$DEPLOY_COMMIT"
+
 echo ""

files.reason: Adds the live verification, deploy handoff, and real proof-call scripts used to prove the shipped path.
Always trigger post-call intelligence after call end so summaries are attempted on production calls.
Tightens buyer activation/login flow so payment follows activation request and invite-based access is clearer.
